name: TRITAX BIG BOX REIT LS-01
summary: Tritax Big Box REIT plc is a real estate investment trust (REIT) focused on owning, managing, and developing large-scale logistics and distribution facilities in the United Kingdom. The company invests in "Big Box" assets, which are typically modern warehouses and distribution centers. Tritax Big Box REIT is headquartered in London, UK.
